sourceNote: Uploaded NP unit PDFs were not present in the monorepo workspace; this audit maps the user's Part 4 spine to static catalog.json (us-np-fnp, 99 rows) and references production DB scale from np-gap-analysis.json (~1408 lessons per NP pathway after legacy import).

notInRegistry.WHNP: No dedicated marketing pathway row; use shared primary-care lessons plus future contentExamKeys/topic tags when a product row is added.
notInRegistry.PNP: Same as WHNP — scale via registry + catalog/DB, not duplicate JSON blobs.

classificationLegend.EXISTS_STRONG_SKIP: Strong lesson likely present — do not clone; verify slug in DB only.
classificationLegend.EXISTS_CATALOG_SAMPLE: Matched static catalog.json us-np-fnp sample (offline bootstrap).
classificationLegend.VERIFY_DB: Not in 99-row catalog slice — assume covered in DB per np-gap-analysis; run SQL/title audit before net-new.
classificationLegend.CREATE_NEW: No safe match — author one canonical slug after DB search.

representativeTopics.notes: No keyword hit in 99-row catalog; likely in full DB set.
Endocrine bucket represented in catalog sample.
No static catalog row; typical NP board gap-fill candidate if DB search empty.
HEENT board area; create only if DB lacks consolidated lesson.
Geriatric hub; overlaps Part L — canonical geriatrics lesson preferred.
